title: Trade Secret Protection Agreement
description: Agreement establishing protection protocols and strict access controls for corporate formulas, source codes, and algorithms.
whatsCovered: Definition of trade secrets (formulas, source codes, database models)
Strict physical and digital access controls
Ban on exporting or caching files on private devices
Survival of secrecy: trade secret duties do not expire
Injunctive relief and financial damages for leaks
whenToUse: Use this agreement to bind advisors, partners, or developers to strict trade secrecy protections regarding core tech.

clauses.heading: TRADE SECRET PROTECTION AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Trade Secret Protection Agreement. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Secrecy Protections
clauses.body: Recipient shall protect trade secrets regarding: {trade_secret_topic}. Digital copies are barred on private devices. Injunctive relief applies.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
